meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Version Control Issues
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to implement professional version control for your freelance projects.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template provides a standardized, scaffolded architecture that enforces Git integration and modular structure from line one. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the synchronization of your local environment with remote repositories, effectively eliminating the 'no version control' trap and ensuring professional-grade code history.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a folder named 'final_v2_real_final' on your desktop, and a cold sweat sets in. The client just asked for a rollback to last week’s logic, but your lack of a robust version control workflow has turned a ten-minute fix into a four-hour archaeological dig through un-tracked local files.

Freelancing is a race against time, and technical debt disguised as 'speed' is the ultimate project killer. It’s time to move beyond chaotic manual backups. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you inject enterprise-grade structure into your workflow, ensuring every iteration is logged, reversible, and production-ready.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a clean, version-controlled foundation by pulling the standard Antigravity template to ensure all configuration files are pre-configured for Git.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project environment using the Antigravity base template. Include a .gitignore file, a standard README, and a pre-configured .git directory.

steps.title: Configure Remote Repository Hooks
steps.description: Connect your local repository to a remote provider like GitHub or GitLab to ensure your work is off-site and safe.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the remote origin for this repository and set up a post-commit hook to auto-push changes to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: git remote add origin <repo-url> && git push -u origin main

steps.title: Establish Atomic Commit Standards
steps.description: Define a commit message convention to ensure your project history is readable and professional for client handoffs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a commit linting script that enforces Conventional Commits (feat, fix, docs, style, refactor) for all staged files.

steps.title: Automate Branching Strategy
steps.description: Use Claude Code to manage feature branches, keeping the 'main' branch stable while you experiment on new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature branch 'auth-module' and ensure the Antigravity build pipeline is isolated to this branch.

steps.title: Implement Automated Deployment Logs
steps.description: Generate a deployment manifest that tracks which version of the code is currently running in your production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script that generates a 'deploy-log.json' file including the current git hash, timestamp, and author before any deployment command executes.

pro_tips: Always alias your most frequent Git commands in your shell profile to save 5 seconds per commit—it adds up over a year.
Use git-lfs if your project involves large assets to prevent repository bloat that slows down cloning.
Never commit API keys; use a .env.example file and ensure .env is strictly in your .gitignore.
Regularly run 'git gc' to prune unnecessary files and optimize your local repository performance.
Tag your production releases using semantic versioning (v1.0.0) so you can revert to a specific client milestone instantly.
content.next_steps: Once your version control is locked, start integrating a CI/CD pipeline to automate your testing suite on every push.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting versioning issues hold your freelance career back. Gain the professional edge that turns one-off clients into long-term retainers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
